name: House I
headline: House I represents the entry into the world
description: Identity in motion: the way of beginning, of presenting oneself and taking one's place. Here we read personal drive and spontaneous style.

name: House II
headline: House II represents resources
description: Values, security and what we build concretely. It speaks of the relationship to money, to the body, and to what brings stability.

name: House III
headline: House III represents everyday learning
description: Communication, close exchanges and curiosity. It describes the way of thinking 'day to day' and connecting with the environment.

name: House IV
headline: House IV represents the roots
description: Home, intimacy and the inner foundation. It speaks of family, personal history and what nourishes a sense of belonging.

name: House V
headline: House V represents creative expression
description: Pleasure, creation and what makes the heart beat. It concerns the joy of expressing oneself, love, leisure and sometimes parenthood.

name: House VI
headline: House VI represents organised daily life
description: Habits, concrete work and attention to the body. It speaks of discipline, health, service and necessary adjustments.

name: House VII
headline: House VII represents the relationship to others
description: Partnerships and one-to-one encounters. It describes how we commit, cooperate, and what we learn through the bond.

name: House VIII
headline: House VIII represents transformation
description: Intense passages: crisis, regeneration, emotional truth. It speaks of deep bonds, shared resources and letting go.

name: House IX
headline: House IX represents openness
description: Studies, travel, philosophy and the quest for meaning. It describes the need to broaden one's vision and understand the 'why'.

name: House X
headline: House X represents vocation
description: Social direction and what we build over the long term. It speaks of career, public image and responsibility towards the world.

name: House XI
headline: House XI represents the collective
description: Friendships, networks and future projects. It describes one's place in a group, shared ideals and the paths towards the future.

name: House XII
headline: House XII represents the invisible
description: Withdrawal, the unconscious and deep inner life. It speaks of what is lived in silence, of healing, and of connection to the subtle.
